Title: Verify Homepage Initialization
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Verify that the Homepage is displayed.

Title: Verify Navigate Button Functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Navigate" button on the Homepage.
2. Verify that the application navigates to the next page.
Expected Result: The application navigates to the next page.

Title: Verify Open in Browser Button Functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Open in Browser" button on the detailed page.
2. Verify that the page opens in the default browser.
Expected Result: The page opens in the default browser.

Title: Verify Call Business Button Functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Call Business" button on the detailed page.
2. Verify that the business is called.

Title: Verify Homepage After Like/Dislike
Preconditions: A detailed page is displayed and like/dislike is performed
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Homepage" button.
2. Verify that the Homepage is displayed.

Title: Verify Modifica Preferenze Button Functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Modifica preferenze" button on the Homepage.
2. Verify that the preference modification interface is displayed.
Expected Result: The preference modification interface is displayed.

Title: Verify Pathfinder Page Initialization
Test Steps:
1. Click the Pathfinder link.
2. Verify that the Pathfinder page is displayed.

Title: Verify Pathfinder Page Back Button Functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Indietro" button on the Pathfinder page.
2. Verify that the previous page is displayed.

Title: Verify Pathfinder Page with Invalid Input
Preconditions: User clicks on Pathfinder link with invalid input
Test Steps:
1. Click the Pathfinder link with invalid input.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify Navigate Button Functionality with Invalid Input
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Navigate" button on the Homepage.
2. Provide the required input (Invalid page number).
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify Call Business Button Functionality with Invalid Input
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Call Business" button on the detailed page.
2. Provide the required input (Invalid business ID).
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify Like/Dislike Button Functionality with Invalid Input
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Like/Dislike" button on the detailed page.
2. Provide the required input (Invalid user token).
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify Modifica Preferenze Button Functionality with Invalid Input
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Modifica preferenze" button on the Homepage.
2. Provide the required input (Invalid preference setting).
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.
